exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: Felt strong at 320 last Friday — bumping to 325-330. Controlled tempo, no locking out at top. 1-2 RIR target.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: Up from 66. Tough at end last session — controlled eccentric is the key. Let it fight you on the way down.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Up from 120 — you hit 120×12×3 clean and strong. Full extension, squeeze glutes at top. No hyperextension.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat (KB)
exercises.note: Hold KB at chest, feet shoulder-width. Sit into it, keep knees tracking toes. Heel elevation OK if mobility needs it.

exercises.name: Step-Up (DB)
exercises.note: Box or flat bench. Drive through the heel, full extension at top. Controlled step down — don't just fall.

exercises.name: Core Circuit: Cable Crunch → Hanging Knee Raise → Side Plank
exercises.detail: Cable crunch 55 lb × 12 → Hanging knee raise × 10-12 → Side plank 25-30 sec/side · 3 rounds
exercises.rest: Minimal rest between movements, 60s between rounds
exercises.note: Cable crunch: kneeling, round into it. Hanging knee raise: controlled, no swinging. Side plank: hip stacked.

week.note: Pickleball or easy walk · ~350 kcal burn · stay on nutrition · let upper session recover
Leg press 325-330 · leg curl 70 · hip thrust 130 · goblet squat 40lb KB · step-ups 25lb · core circuit
Full rest · stay on nutrition · post-dinner walk if energy is there
Flat bench 57.5s · cable row 135 · lat pulldown 120 · shoulder press 35s · arms superset · core circuit
20-min jog or pickleball · easy pace · no gym
Follow-up lower session · progressions from Monday
